4.8 stars. 80 reviews. Every single one mentions leaving looser than they arrived.

Serenity Spa on 1 Võ Thị Sáu is pulling those numbers for a reason. Book same-day if you can. Slots fill fast, especially after beach days when everyone's back is done.

Phu Quoc moves fast. Your body needs a reset. This is where you get it.
